author: moodmosaic
content: <@864736013048741898>, I just looked through the repos above and the direction looks good. Thanks for sharing them. One thing I noticed -- and I could be wrong since I only skimmed the contents and didn’t run anything -- is that there doesn’t seem to be any lazy-loading of context (e.g. via skills, etc.); it looks like most or all of it lives in `agents.md`. I do think this is valuable work and worth preserving.
